series_metadata.series_description: Records related to testing, approval, or disapproval for placement of any device, software, hardware, or other technology in the Commission''s approved electronic gaming equipment or skill-based amusement machine databases.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format for three years, then destroy. Once converted into verified machine-readable format, if at all, shred paper copies. ; Electronic: Retain for three years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
